_description: A-SAFE PAS 13 / EN test certificates uploaded to R2 at certificates/<slug>.pdf. Served publicly via GET /api/certificates/:slug. Each entry maps one certificate PDF to one or more product families (by family id or fuzzy-matched name). The admin endpoint /api/admin/upload-certificates inserts a resources row per cert and product_resources junction rows for each matched family. Idempotent — matched by slug.

certificates.title: PAS 13 Certificate — Pedestrian Barrier 130 T0/P3
certificates.description: Official A-SAFE PAS 13 impact test certificate (independently audited) for the 130mm Pedestrian Barrier classification, T0 traffic / P3 pedestrian rating.

certificates.title: PAS 13 Certificate — Traffic Barrier 190 T1/P0
certificates.description: Official A-SAFE PAS 13 impact test certificate for the 190mm Traffic Barrier classification, T1 traffic / P0 pedestrian rating.

certificates.title: PAS 13 Certificate — Traffic Barrier 190 T2/P0
certificates.description: Official A-SAFE PAS 13 impact test certificate for the 190mm heavy-duty Traffic Barrier classification, T2 traffic / P0 pedestrian rating. Covers the Atlas Double Traffic Barrier range.

certificates.title: PAS 13 Certificate — Pedestrian Barrier 190 T1/P2
certificates.description: Official A-SAFE PAS 13 impact test certificate for the 190mm Pedestrian Barrier classification, T1 traffic / P2 pedestrian rating.

certificates.title: PAS 13 Certificate — Pedestrian Barrier 190 T2/P1
certificates.description: Official A-SAFE PAS 13 impact test certificate for the 190mm Pedestrian Barrier classification, T2 traffic / P1 pedestrian rating.

certificates.title: PAS 13 Certificate — Step Guard 600/1200
certificates.description: Official A-SAFE PAS 13 impact test certificate for the Step Guard pedestrian crossing point at 600mm and 1200mm heights.

certificates.title: PAS 13 Certificate — Bollard Bumper
certificates.description: Official A-SAFE PAS 13 impact test certificate for the Bollard Bumper accessory.

certificates.title: PAS 13 Certificate — Traffic Gate
certificates.description: Official A-SAFE PAS 13 impact test certificate for the A-SAFE Traffic Gate (wide vehicle access within barrier systems).

certificates.title: EN 15512 Certificate — RackGuard
certificates.description: Official A-SAFE EN 15512 test certificate for the RackGuard rack leg protector, covering all height and profile variants.

certificates.title: A-SAFE Certification Overview (PRH-1011)
certificates.description: A-SAFE's company-wide certification document (ref PRH-1011) summarising accreditations, test-method methodology and third-party verification across the barrier range.
